text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so the average pay for a housekeeping
service job is...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess that rate makes sense. Sigh... Salaries, man...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right, that's my priorities set! Hold tight, you
two—your big sister's going to make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The halfway point of summer camp is here. We've
been working hard on our specialized camp
regimen, but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Phew! How was my time?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I compare the numbers on the stopwatch to the
list of her previous times.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I had a hunch. It felt like I had way too
much energy left after.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh, I'm getting impatient. I know I need to
hold back, but that's different from not actually
trying, you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Derby, Ines Fujin asked that we focus
on efficiency, but that's much easier said than
done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tends to follow her instincts, going all out
and spending every ounce of energy regardless of
her opponents' actions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, she's always going at full throttle
to try and beat her personal best. Now, though,
we need her to keep a steady pace without
pushing her limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if she always has her foot pressed on the
pedal, that's not going to happen. To make this
work, she needs to learn to exercise careful
control over her running.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... It makes sense in my head, but...
choice_data_list: ...You're not feeling this new style of running?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: No, but I can't just give up on it, either!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if I keep on collapsing, I'll end up unable
to do anything anyway.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm tired of the hospital visits, and I don't want to
stress you out anymore...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to give it another shot! I'll run as many
times as I have to!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll be fine—I am the big sister, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing their training, the students spend
their free time doing as they please.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey! ☆ Palmster, let's get hype for this
summer par-tay!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Bet! We don't get to go to summer camp every
day! Train hard, play hard!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Regarding tomorrow's partner run, perhaps we
could go for 3,000 meters?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! I was hoping I'd get to run with you
before the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While many are resting to recharge their strength,
others are preparing for tomorrow's training. Ines
Fujin, on the other hand...
choice_data_list: Where did she get off to?

text_block_list.name: Beach House Owner
text_block_list.text:
Okay, could you wipe off the swim rings we got
back and put them out to dry?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Whoops, you found me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, though! I got permission from the
academy to work here part-time.
choice_data_list: Haven't you been working a lot more recently?
Haven't you been working a lot more recently?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I don't get worn out like I used to!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And I've been earning a lot more too, you know!
My sisters aren't going to have to lift a finger on
my watch!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah. Well, the last time I went home, we kinda got
into an argument.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: They were saying all this stuff like they were the grown-ups. But they shouldn't have to worry about the house...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm not letting anything get in the way of
those kids' dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, as I'm preparing to start training
with Ines Fujin...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Graaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a pair of Umamusume yell in unison,
speeding along the beach and leaving a cloud of
sand in their wake.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hm. With the Kikuka Sho so close, Mejiro Ryan's
form has certainly sharpened up.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, but the prodigy of the Mejiro house is not
to be taken lightly either. Take a look.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
McQueen isn't the slightest bit out of breath. If
she's going to be competing at the Kikuka Sho, I
have no choice but to rethink my strategy...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan's only getting faster and faster...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, just you watch! Today, I'm going to master this new style of running!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin breaks into a run. I can see her pace
rapidly picking up speed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This new efficient running style is proving tough
for her to control. With the Kikuka Sho fast
approaching, her impatience is showing in her
speed.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... How... was that?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Let's chow down and power up!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Wha?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Chomp! Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What?! I'm still eating here!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm stuffed! Thanks for the meal!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm all rested up—really! So can we have another
training session?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to do everything I can! It'd be way worse to
skip out and regret it later, you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The end of summer camp is almost upon us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwooosh!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, it sounds so powerful. And I can hear the
birds chirping too. Ahh, I really feel at peace.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...So, how much longer should I stare at this
waterfall for?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, take a deep breath. Okay, and keep breathing in. Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Good, now breathe out. Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay, done. So, are you as calm as I am?
choice_data_list: Sorry for coming up with such a weird idea.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No, it's okay. It really was a nice change of pace.
You suggested this at just the right time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to get it together! As both a runner and a big sister!
